stemHtml:
Refer to VFR Chart ED-4 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
You are approaching airfield MÜHLDORF (EDMY, N48° 16.77' E012° 30.02') from the east on track 270°. The descent should be planned to arrive at an altitude of 3500 ft approximately abeam of airfield ALTÖTTING.

Atmospheric conditions = ISA,
TAS = 110 kt,
average wind = 300°(T) / 16 kt,
rate of descent = 500 ft/min,
cruising level = FL125.

How many nautical miles from MÜHLDORF is your top of descent (ToD)?
